name: Marketing blocked by product decisions
evidence: Marketing site pricing page blocked for 20 days waiting on pricing decision
Blog content can't describe features that aren't finalized yet
Marketing momentum dropped from medium to low while product stayed medium
interpretation: Product decisions are blocking marketing progress. The pricing decision needs to be made to unblock 2 entities at once.
risk: Marketing site goes fully stale. Launch happens with no marketing presence.
recommendation: Make the pricing decision this week — even a temporary one — to unblock the marketing site.
